libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker service or external WebDAV server is required; focus on in-process coverage of XML/DAV method construction, headers, reports, properties, and servlet-facing adapters using lightweight mocks or stubs. Use javax.servlet-era APIs, not jakarta.servlet.

deterministic_setup.reason: Core library classes such as WebdavRequestImpl, WebdavResponseImpl, AbstractWebdavServlet, InputContextImpl, OutputContextImpl, and header parsers use javax.servlet types, while the Maven artifact marks servlet-api as provided and it is not reliably available from a normal test scaffold.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8851 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.apache.jackrabbit:jackrabbit-webdav:2.0-beta4; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The library is old and uses pre-Jakarta javax.servlet APIs; using jakarta.servlet would not compile.
A missing SLF4J binding may produce warnings but is not required for meaningful coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: jackrabbit-webdav is an in-process WebDAV server/client utility library, but its servlet-facing APIs are central to meaningful coverage and the artifact declares javax.servlet:servlet-api as provided, so the generated test scaffold needs that test dependency explicitly.
